q: Centripetal force is the force acting towards the centre of the circular path around which the object is moving whereas the ___ appears to act in a direction pointing away from the centre.
When the car is moving with constant velocity along a straight road, there is no ___ on the person.
When the car moves around a curve the person feels an outward force exerted on him. This is the centrifugal force caused by the effect of ___.
It is an apparent or fictitious force which is equal and opposite to the ___.
A ___ is a piece of equipment that puts an object in rotation around a fixed axis.
In a laboratory centrifuge that uses sample test tubes, the radial acceleration causes denser particles to settle to the bottom of the tube, while ___ substances rise to the top.
Centrifugal pump is a hydraulic machine which converts ___ into hydraulic energy.
The centrifugal action of a washing machine is used in ___ the clothes.
The ___ is a device used to measure and regulate the speed of a machine, such as an engine.
A satellite orbiting a planet is supported by the ___.
